bird.name: 藍翅鸚鵡
bird.summary: 蓝翅鹦鹉（學名：Neophema chrysostoma，台湾作藍翼鸚鵡）是分佈在塔斯曼尼亞及澳洲東南部的細小鸚鵡。 藍翅鸚鵡只有20厘米長，主要呈橄欖綠色，前額至眼睛間有藍帶，飛羽白色，腹部黃色。尾巴頂呈藍灰色，兩側及下尾呈黃色。牠們是兩性異形的，雌鳥較為沉色，雙翼上也有較多…

locations.name: Heinrich Kuhl
locations.summary: Heinrich Kuhl (17 September 1797 – 14 September 1821) was a German naturalist and zoologist.

locations.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
locations.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州（Tasmania，發音：/tæzˈmeɪniə/；帕拉瓦卡尼語：Lutruwita），簡稱塔州，是澳大利亞唯一的島嶼州，原名范迪門地（Van Diemen's Land，又譯萬迪門蘭）。該州位於澳大利亞大陸東南方約240公里…

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

relations.subject: 藍翅鸚鵡
relations.evidence: The blue-winged parrot (Neophema chrysostoma), also known as the blue-banded parakeet or blue-banded grass-parakeet, is a small parrot found in Tasmania and southeast mainland Australia

relations.subject: 藍翅鸚鵡
relations.evidence: It is more sporadic across central and western New South Wales and into Queensland, as far north as Diamantina National Park. It lives in savannah woodland, grasslands, orchards, farmlands, marshes, heath, dunes, and other open habitats up to above sea level
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
